src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Added a default value to the numeric configuration property to prevent startup failures if the property is missing.
Removed dynamic string interpolation from the welcome message text to simplify the output.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.human_impl: result.setText("Welcome to Cloud Native Java with Spring Boot!");

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Moved configuration values from the message text into dedicated fields on the Message object for better data structure.
Changed the default locale of the message from German to English.
Added a new String field 'stringConfigValue' to the Message entity.
Added a new int field 'numericConfigValue' to the Message entity.
Added getter and setter methods for the new stringConfigValue field.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.human_impl: public String getStringConfigValue() { return stringConfigValue; } public void setStringConfigValue(String stringConfigValue) { this.stringConfigValue = stringConfigValue; }

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Added getter and setter methods for the new numericConfigValue field.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.human_impl: public int getNumericConfigValue() { return numericConfigValue; } public void setNumericConfigValue(int numericConfigValue) { this.numericConfigValue = numericConfigValue; }

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Simplified the equals method logic for the id field using a more concise conditional expression.
src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.human_impl: if (id == null) { return other.id == null; } else return id.equals(other.id);

src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Replaced Hamcrest matchers with AssertJ assertions for more fluent and readable test verification.
Added import for the Message entity to enable deserialization of the REST response.
Changed test method visibility from public to package-private to follow modern JUnit 5 conventions.
Extracted the REST response into a strongly typed Message object instead of using raw JSON path assertions.
Added comprehensive assertions for all fields of the Message object including id, code, text, config values, and locale.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.2.4, which is required for full JDK 21 support and modern features.
Upgrade logstash-logback-encoder to 7.4 to ensure compatibility with newer logging frameworks.
Upgrade JUnit 5 to version 5.10.1 for latest test framework features.
Upgrade RestAssured to version 5.4.0 for API testing compatibility.
Add dependency on internal common REST library version 1.2.0.
Add dependency on internal common persistence JPA library version 1.2.0.
Add dependency on internal common observability library version 1.2.0.
Upgrade internal common test core library to version 1.3.0.
Remove the explicit Jakarta test dependency, likely consolidated into the core test library.
Define multi-architecture Docker build platforms (AMD64 and ARM64).
Change Kubernetes cluster namespace from 'default' to 'cloudtrain'.
Update Kubernetes ingress host to a specific development subdomain.
Upgrade maven-clean-plugin to version 3.3.2.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to version 3.11.0.
Upgrade maven-dependency-plugin to version 3.6.1.
Upgrade maven-deploy-plugin to version 3.1.1.
Upgrade fabric8 docker-maven-plugin to version 0.43.4.
Upgrade maven-enforcer-plugin to version 3.4.1.
Upgrade maven-failsafe-plugin to version 3.2.1.
Upgrade maven-flatten-plugin to version 1.5.0.
Upgrade maven-install-plugin to version 3.1.1.
Upgrade maven-jar-plugin to version 3.3.0.
Upgrade maven-resources-plugin to version 3.3.1.
Upgrade maven-site-plugin to version 3.12.1.
Upgrade maven-source-plugin to version 3.3.0.
Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to version 3.2.1.
Add maven-war-plugin version 3.4.0 to properties.
Upgrade custom compose-maven-plugin to version 5.1.0.
Upgrade custom helm-maven-plugin to version 5.0.0.
Upgrade sonar-maven-plugin to version 3.10.0.2594.
Upgrade jacoco-maven-plugin to version 0.8.11.
Add OWASP dependency-check-maven plugin version 9.0.7 for security scanning.
Remove explicit Undertow starter and Tomcat exclusion, reverting to default Spring Boot embedded server (Tomcat).
Move plugin configurations from profiles to the main build section for consistency.
pom.xml.human_impl: <!-- moved surefire, spring-boot, resources, docker, compose, failsafe, jacoco, dependency, helm, owasp, sonar plugins to main build -->

pom.xml.general_idea: Enable filtering for main resources to allow property substitution.
Simplify pre-commit-stage profile by skipping QA checks (Sonar, OWASP, Jacoco) instead of redefining plugins.
Remove the local-stage profile, likely consolidating local development into other mechanisms.
Update project revision to 8.0.0.
Configure docker-maven-plugin to use Buildx for multi-platform image building.
Refactor integration-test-stage profile to skip unnecessary plugins and streamline Helm deployment steps.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed maven-jar-plugin and maven-resources-plugin executions; simplified helm-maven-plugin to just pull and deploy.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit plugin and artifact repositories for the CloudTrain Maven repository to ensure dependency resolution.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add the flattened POM file generated by the maven-flatten-plugin to the gitignore to prevent committing build artifacts.

README.md.general_idea: Rewrote the README to provide a detailed technical synopsis of Spring Boot Externalized Configuration, including source precedence and injection mechanisms.
README.md.human_impl: Added sections explaining configuration sources, @Value injection, and @ConfigurationProperties with links to Spring docs.

README.md.general_idea: Replaced the empty build status badge with a functional AWS CodeBuild badge URL.
Updated Docker and Helm pull commands to reference the correct Quarkus-based artifact names instead of the old Spring Boot names.
README.md.human_impl: Changed `cnj-config-backend-spring` to `cnj-hello-backend-quarkus` in docker pull and helm pull commands.

README.md.general_idea: Replaced manual Docker run instructions with standardized Maven build and Docker Compose up/down commands for local development.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced `docker run ...` with `mvn clean verify` and `docker compose up -d` / `docker compose down`.

README.md.general_idea: Added a new section detailing how to demo the showcase, including local/remote URLs and expected JSON response format.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'HOW-TO demo this showcase' section with GET request example and JSON output.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the Docker base image from a JRE 17 Alpine variant to a JRE 21 Alpine variant to align with the target JDK version.
Update JVM garbage collection flags to use ZGC with generational support, which is optimized for Java 21.
Explicitly set the file encoding to UTF-8 via JVM options to ensure consistent character handling.

src/main/helm/cnj-config-backend-spring/.general_idea: Added environment variable for CloudTrain string configuration value.
Added environment variable for CloudTrain numeric configuration value.
Added conditional logic to generate a standard Kubernetes Ingress resource with NGINX-specific annotations when the ingress type is set to 'nginx'.
src/main/helm/cnj-config-backend-spring/.human_impl: Added block: {{- if eq .Values.ingress.type "nginx" }} ... apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1 ... annotations: nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rewrite-target: /$2 ...

src/main/helm/cnj-config-backend-spring/.general_idea: Added conditional logic to generate Traefik-specific IngressRoute and Middleware resources when the ingress type is set to 'traefik'.
src/main/helm/cnj-config-backend-spring/.human_impl: Added block: {{- if eq .Values.ingress.type "traefik" -}} ... apiVersion: traefik.containo.us/v1alpha1 ... kind: IngressRoute ... kind: Middleware ...

src/main/helm/cnj-config-backend-spring/.general_idea: Simplified the top-level Helm template condition to check only for ingress.enabled, removing the hardcoded dependency on a 'default' type.
Added support for capturing path prefixes in NGINX ingress rules to allow for proper rewrite targets.
src/main/helm/cnj-config-backend-spring/.human_impl: Added conditional path definition: {{- if eq .Values.ingress.pathType "Prefix" }} - path: {{ .Values.ingress.path }}(/|$)(.*) {{- else }} - path: {{ .Values.ingress.path }} {{- end }}

src/main/helm/cnj-config-backend-spring/.general_idea: Changed the Kubernetes ingress class and type from Traefik to NGINX to align with the new deployment infrastructure.

src/main/resources/application-cloud.pro.general_idea: Renamed the configuration file and updated comments to reflect the 'cloud' profile instead of 'default'.
src/main/resources/application-cloud.pro.human_impl: Changed filename to application-cloud.properties and updated header comment to 'profile cloud'.

src/main/resources/application-cloud.pro.general_idea: Disabled the Spring Boot startup banner in the cloud profile configuration.
Removed the configuration that exposed all actuator endpoints.
Removed custom application properties related to cloudtrain configuration values.
